feature.name: Credits Page Cleanup (TSK-0453)
feature.description: Update credit pack pricing, add tier tooltips, wire CreditEstimator to credit_menu DB table, and verify Stripe + auto top-up integration.

existingState.stripePurchase: ALREADY WORKING — CreditPurchaseModal → create-credit-checkout edge fn → Stripe Checkout Session → stripe-webhook fulfills pack
existingState.autoTopUp: ALREADY WORKING — AutoTopUpSettings component + credit-auto-topup edge fn + auto_top_up_settings/log tables
existingState.creditMenu: ALREADY EXISTS — credit_menu table with 22 seeded actions, get-credit-menu edge fn, CreditMenuTable reads from DB
existingState.tierTooltips: PARTIAL — CreditMenuTable has tier badges, but CreditEstimator and SimpleModelTierSelector show hardcoded costs without tier explanation tooltips
existingState.pricing: NEEDS UPDATE — creditPacks.ts has Starter £49, Growth £99, Scale £149 but task requires Signal £15, Insight £30, Intelligence £50
existingState.estimator: NEEDS UPDATE — CreditEstimator uses hardcoded ACTION_CREDIT_COSTS instead of fetching from credit_menu table

subtaskMapping.subtask1_tier_tooltips: Add hover tooltips explaining low/medium/high tiers to CreditEstimator and SimpleModelTierSelector
subtaskMapping.subtask2_topup_packs: Update pack pricing in creditPacks.ts: Signal 100/£15, Insight 250/£30, Intelligence 500/£50
subtaskMapping.subtask3_stripe_payment: Already working. Verify create-credit-checkout uses updated prices. No code change needed if creditPacks.ts is the source of truth.
subtaskMapping.subtask4_auto_topup: Already fully implemented. No code change needed.
subtaskMapping.subtask5_credit_variables: Wire CreditEstimator to fetch costs from credit_menu table instead of hardcoded ACTION_CREDIT_COSTS
subtaskMapping.subtask6_unknown: Not visible in screenshot — likely cosmetic or edge case

stories.title: Update credit pack pricing to new values
acceptance: USD and EUR prices updated proportionally

stories.title: Add intelligence tier tooltips to CreditEstimator and SimpleModelTierSelector
acceptance: Hovering low/medium/high tier labels shows tooltip with description (e.g. 'Low: Fastest, cheapest. Uses Haiku-class models.')
Tooltips appear in CreditEstimator tier selector
Tooltips appear in SimpleModelTierSelector tier cards
Tooltips use existing Tooltip/TooltipTrigger/TooltipContent from UI library

stories.title: Wire CreditEstimator to credit_menu table instead of hardcoded costs
acceptance: CreditEstimator fetches action costs from get-credit-menu edge function
Falls back to hardcoded ACTION_CREDIT_COSTS if fetch fails
Loading state while fetching credit menu
Cost values match credit_menu table (not hardcoded constants)

stories.title: Verify Stripe checkout and auto top-up work with updated pack prices
acceptance: CreditPurchaseModal shows updated pack names and prices
Quick Top-Up buttons on Credits page show Signal £15, Insight £30, Intelligence £50
AutoTopUpSettings pack selector shows updated names and prices
create-credit-checkout edge function picks up correct GBP price from shared creditPacks.ts

manual: Navigate to Settings → Credits & AI → Top Up tab — pack buttons show Signal £15, Insight £30, Intelligence £50
Click a pack → CreditPurchaseModal shows correct pricing
Open Credit Estimator → tier selector shows tooltips on hover
Estimator costs match credit_menu table values
Settings tab → Auto Top-Up pack selector shows updated names
Settings tab → AI Model Configuration tier labels have tooltips
Pricing tab → CreditMenuTable still loads from DB correctly
